summary: V4 Discipline-Mode Overhaul testing complete. All 14 V4 requirements verified end-to-end for both Focus Mode (test@habitrpg.com) and Game Mode (admin@habitrpg.com). CSS dual-mode tokens present, conditional nav working, Focus Mode fully strips gamification, Settings Progress embed working, Discord-style Public Profile renders correctly. Backend was 100% in iteration_4, no backend changes in V4.

design_issues.screen: Shared Dialog components (Logout, Switch Mode, Edit Profile, Change Password, Add Habit)
issues: Console a11y warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent'. Minor - add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to each DialogContent for screen reader accessibility.

passed_tests: Focus Mode nav (desktop+mobile): only Home and Settings — no Level/Shop/Progress
Focus Mode HomePage: XP bar, level badge, gems, boost, shields all absent
Focus Mode Settings: Progress section shown, Profile Colors hidden
Focus Mode Settings: Total XP and Highest Level hidden from All-Time Stats
Game Mode nav (desktop+mobile): Home/Level/Shop/Settings — Progress removed
Game Mode HomePage: xp-bar, level-badge, gems-display all rendered
Game Mode Settings: Progress section, color-settings, Total XP and Highest Level all shown
mode-game class applied to dashboard-layout root
--user-accent and --user-banner CSS variables dynamically set from equipped colors (admin shows banner=#8B5CF6)
Public Profile Discord-style: banner strip, overlapping avatar with colored ring, level pill, 4 stat cards (Total XP, Current Streak, Longest Streak, Habits Done)
Landing page renders normally at '/' in browser (non-standalone)
Both test accounts (admin@habitrpg.com / test@habitrpg.com) authenticate successfully
action_items: Low priority: Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to shadcn DialogContent instances to clear a11y warning
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.js: XpPopAnimation is always mounted and handleCompleteHabit only pushes xpEvents when isGameMode is true, so Focus Mode is unaffected — good. However the xpIdRef/xpEvents state is still initialized in Focus Mode (harmless but dead code in that branch).
ModeContext.js: --user-accent injection only runs for Game Mode; Focus Mode resets to #3B82F6 default which is correct per spec.

SettingsPage.js ProgressSection: axios calls don't pass withCredentials:true unlike other calls in the file (relies on axios defaults). Works today because app uses bearer tokens, but inconsistent with surrounding code.
PublicProfilePage.js: unauthenticated endpoint /api/profile/:username — verify backend properly excludes sensitive fields (email, password hash, notification_settings). Not retested this iteration.
seed_data_creation: No new seed. Uses existing seeded admin + test user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V4 Discipline-Mode Overhaul verified. Focus Mode users (test@habitrpg.com) see ZERO gamification (no XP/level/gems/shop/progress tab). Game Mode (admin@habitrpg.com) retains full gamification; Progress is now embedded inside Settings (no tab in nav). Public Profile is Discord-style (banner strip, overlapping avatar with ring, level pill, stat cards). CSS custom props --user-accent/--user-banner are injected from user.selected_main_color/selected_banner_color in Game Mode. All V4 data-testids are in place: nav-desktop-{home,level,shop,settings}, progress-section, color-settings, profile-banner, profile-avatar, profile-level-pill, profile-stats.
